steps.t: The Rangers plan to relocate to Gadim-ûn so they can help the Jatsakóri. You should talk to Khagâmi at the Rangers' camp to see if she would like to g…
Khagâmi wants to accompany you to Gadim-ûn. You should talk to Rhadrog at his camp about your next steps.
In an effort not to put a strain on their resources, Rhadrog has asked you to go to Abníshu, a kalorkhûn roost to the west and collect some meat to br…
You have found a dwarf at Abníshu, also fighting the kalorkhûn. You should talk to him.
You have gathered kalorkhûn meat for the people of Gadim-ûn, and met a dwarf, Mêshaget, along the way. You should return to Gadim-ûn in north-eastern …
You have gathered kalorkhûn meat for the Jatsakóri, and returned to Gadim-ûn. You should talk to Nabatínu and give him the meat.
